subcodes.first_line: O Crimson Leaf! Rejoice thou in that thy Best Beloved, the All-Glorious, the Wronged One, maketh mention of thee [3.5s]... ...Praise be to Thee, O Thou Who hast revealed to me Thy lofty Horizon, aided me to recognize Thy most exalted Word, and drawn me nigh
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایتها الورقه الورقه الحمرآء ان افرحی بما یذکرک محبوبک الابهی و المظلوم
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
